My Cassiah uses this mainly. This focuses on using her rouse so my cov and wheel gives 3 extra strikes
nice
as for her team
Cassiah is mainly there to upkeep my damage using telekinesis and drawing cards since I get too much arithmetic
Daffodil is the main damage while Clementine and gdoll both act as dps-supports
Can't believe Casiah hat victimized someone
genuinely, Cassiah shines very well if paired with anyone like Tawil or with Aequor

Two things: Realm mastery and Telekinesis (discard or no dsicard)
Which gives an inspiration

Usually people recommend other supports for the corposant team

ehhhhhh.... Does Corpo use discards?
she's the discard carry
along with aurita

because it gives her an experimental purpose for realm mixing

depending if you need to burst or give more insights/inspiration

all I know is that Cassiah mitigates a lot of arithmetic low economy for Aequor now
becaue of Aftershock

Since Aequor is currently my weakest realm
Tulu, basically anyone that has aftershock in their card text
aurita is a good free teammate because her skill also discards

Can u help me team form using these units
Rn im using tawil caecus miryam and murphy
You can slot in Goliath or Ramona instead of Miryam or Caecus.
What team to make with Tawil?
First you want E1, and ideally E2 Tawil.
Then you can run Tawil/Caecus/Ramona/Doll
Do I get her wheel? Essential?
Thank u
Yes. Its good on her and is a hand-size wheel, which are must pull WoDs.
No problem~
But i read someone suggested to use the brown wods instead
Is it because we need dupes of wheel for better usage?
You wont use brown/R WoDs forever.
Later on there is a different set of rules that make R/Brown WoDs *useless*.
Then you need Golden and Purple WoDs.
Alright. Should we pull for wod dupes?
Furthermore, some WoDs are just really good in general, or on a specific character. Which means you run it instead of a Brown/R WoD.
Depends on the WoD.
For example, you would run a “Titan Blade” instead of a Brown/R WoD for your DPS.
Okie thank u 🙏

That looks pretty good. I say add someone that can frequently add those fetus cards like Leigh as the budget options. Thais or Pickman is optimal

I know gRamona is more of a niche support so wanted to know if any of the carries I'm building would really benefit from her before spending on wheel jail

Pollux, Castor, Doresain, Uvhash OE, Tawil teams, Sanga OE
Long-term (not where the OP is at), Sorel and Uvhash will end up competing for consumes. Given Faint, I'd swap Sorel for Leigh (or Thais / Pickman). But yeah, that team wants more embryo gen.
In theory you play that team feeding everything to Uvhash aliemus-wise, face tanking, and using Faint and Aigis to selectively not die.

Hey y'all, noob hey. I was wondering who to pick from the arc 2 character selector I kinda like GDoll and who else i should pull in its limited banner, or should i use my guarantee to get e1 tawil?

You can pair her with other poison units like gdoll, blue 24, daff (I think 🤔). Other general supports: ham, Thais, horla, Clem; and tanks because poison is very slow especially with nymp: lily, castor
I personally can't speak on this but ik a lot of people recommend Castor at E0 because he is a solid shielder without much investment and can become a really strong dps at E3
Kath is also really good but u need E3
I also just pulled corpo too from the banner and getting her to from the posse pick for future aequor team
I personally chose GDoll because I like her design and later on she can be one of the best endgame units,  she's really really good at OE, but will require a lot more resources than other awakeners
in flare's video on what you should pull for during the anniversary, the order he recommended was Kath, castor, tawil, gdoll
this was for pulls tho and not the selector, kath and castor require the least investment
I see so what if i want to main tawil? Who would synergize with her?
I'm not too versed on this cuz I'm relatively new, so take with a grain of salt
but I'm pretty sure Tawil being really resource heavy means u want to run support units like gdol, hameln, ogier, etc.
i checked the d dive leaderboard and #1 rn is running tawil, hameln, karen, ogier
#2 is running kath ogier doll horla (kath is excellent as main dps)
usually people go either bluewill (with aqueor team like with caecus)
I see
or pure chaos
